artDirection: Closer tribute to Creatures 3 and Docking Station: cozy biotech, readable side-view rooms, tactile handmade props, original regenerated assets.
runtimeShape: Hybrid 2D/3D: 2D generated backgrounds, props, UI, food, and eggs; 3D Norns retained for now with regenerated texture and concept work.

assets.replacementTarget: Nano Banana Treehouse backdrop with blocked walk paths
assets.sourceNotes: Regenerated ultra-wide Treehouse backdrop with broad, unobstructed floor lanes and central elevator space.
Runtime keeps the current 3D Norn model but uses regenerated warm/cream/teal texture maps; sex and mutation differences are applied by CreatureAppearance at runtime.

Original stylized procedural 3D Norn source remains available for iteration, but it is no longer the default runtime model after visual QA. The legacy GLB is the default until a better authored/generated 3D model is available.
Create a small readable 2D egg sprite with transparent background for Sprite3D runtime use.
Create compact food sprites that read clearly against detailed metaroom backgrounds.
Create a distinct seed sprite for the C3/DS seed category and fat nutrition path.
Create a distinct prepared-food sprite for the C3/DS food category and protein nutrition path.
Small readable interface icons for creature care, camera, breeding, and future agent panels.

assets.replacementTarget: Future authored props over the Treehouse backdrop
assets.sourceNotes: Layered prop sprites should preserve walkable-floor readability and avoid hiding Norns.
